[30;1m104 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m105 | [0m[35m#### Command Options[0m
[30;1m106 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m107 | [0m[35mThe `smart-corrector` supports several options to customize its operation, including `--commit-diff`[0m
[30;1m108 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m109 | [0m[35m```bash[0m
[30;1m110 | [0m[35mcode-artisan smart-corrector --commit-diff HEAD~1..HEAD[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m14[0m[34m of [0m[33m16[0m[31m ]--[0m
